meaning: n.[化]阴丹士林(一种蓝色染料的商标名)
examples: This paper discusses the principles of control and over-reduction of indanthrene blue RSN in the dyeing process.
In this paper the method of recovering indanthrene dye with PS-1 type ultrafilter made by ourselves is described.
Colored discharge printing of deep ground cotton fabric was carried out with indanthrene dyes. The printing effect which can not be got by direct printing method now was realized.
